channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Updated Commencement Important Dates and Details
item.description: On Friday, May 8th important dates and items were sent out to all registered graduates attending commencement. Keep an eye out for all communications as graduation day approaches!
item.author: Students

item.title: Retail and Dining Hours of Operations: Spring to Summer Transition
item.description: As we wrap up the Spring 2026 semester and prepare for the Summer 2026 term, the hours of operations for retail and dining hall locations on campus will be adjusted. Please click the link above for full details. We thank you and look forward to serving you this summer.
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI at Work Information Session
item.description: Date: Thursday, May 14, 2026 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM - RPI at Work Dean Aric Krause, Ph. D., will be reviewing the online, project-based graduate degrees and certificates. Expect to hear details about how RPI Instructor Mentors provide industry expertise, advice, and mentorship in a targeted and experiential learning environment. Please RSVP if you plan to attend and learn more about RPI at Work.
item.author: Community

item.title: CEE Seminar Series - Dr. Andrii Galkin Professor at OM Beketov National University of Urban Economy in Kharkiv
item.description: Date: Thursday, May 14, 2026 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM - “Transport Systems in Protracted Conflict: The Normalization of Wartime Mobility”. This study examines how urban transport systems function under protracted armed conflict, when mobility is no longer organized around peacetime efficiency or short-term emergency response, but around long-duration adaptation under persistent threat. Using Ukraine as the principal case, the study explores how transport systems shift across operational modes, how…
item.author: Community

item.title: Biological Sciences Inaugural Bray Day Graduation Celebration
item.description:
Date: Thursday, May 14, 2026 3:00 PM - 4:30 PM - In honor of the 100th academic year of the Department of Biological Sciences at RPI, we invite you to the first annual Bray Day Graduation Celebration! Join Biological Sciences on Thursday, May 14th at 3:00pm in the CBIS Auditorium as we celebrate our graduating Undergraduate and Graduate students. The winners of the Department of Biological Sciences 2026 Commencement Prizes will also be announced. Please RSVP by May 1st! https://forms.gle…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
